title: Time to say hi - new developer community manager

posts.author: OmerK (Omer Koort)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello There!

I’ve already started answering questions on our Slack channel, but I wanted to officially introduce myself here.

My name is Omer, and I’m really excited to be here and take part in managing the Marketplace Developer Community.

To help you get to know me better, I’ve made an introduction video with some fun facts and a bit about how I envision our connection.

Lastly, I’m also sharing a link to a feedback form that will help me better understand your thoughts, needs, and feedback about the community. You can find the form here.
